commands: node --test tests/js/*.test.mjs python -B -m unittest discover -s tests/deployment_conformance -p "test_*.py" -v
node --test tests/js/*.test.mjs python -B -m unittest discover -s tests/effective_route_consumers -p "test_*.py" -v

mode=package if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "push" ]; then mode=final; fi python -B -m tools.operations_observability.validate --root . --mode "$mode" --report artifacts/operations-observability-report.json

node --test tests/js/operations-observability.test.mjs tests/js/premium-home.test.mjs python -B -m unittest discover -s tests/operations_observability -p "test_*.py" -v python -B -m unittest discover -s tests/visual_experience -p "test_*.py" -v

mode=package if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "push" ]; then mode=final; fi python -B -m tools.production_baseline.validate --root . --mode "$mode" python -B -m tools.visual_experience.validate --root . python -B -m tools.deployment_conformance.validate --root . python -B -m tools.effective_route_consumers.validate --root . python -B -m tools.operations_observability.validate --root . --mode "$mode" --report artifacts/operations-observability-report.json python -B -m tools.repository_hygiene.validate --root . python -B -m tools.repository_integrity.validate --root . --manifest manifest-release-245.json
node --test tests/js/*.test.mjs python -B -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v

git config user.name 'github-actions[bot]' git config user.email '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com' git add repository-quality-audit.json route-inventory.json workflow-inventory.json repository-audit-summary.md if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo 'No audit result changes.' else git commit -m 'chore: update repository quality audit reports' git push fi

recommendations.action: Remove broad push triggers from repository-quality-audit.yml and retain workflow_dispatch plus a scheduled run.
recommendations.reason: The full audit is expensive and does not need to run after every content upload.

recommendations.action: Combine repository-hygiene.yml and repository-integrity.yml into one repository-quality gate after command-level comparison.
recommendations.reason: Both belong to the same repository-quality category and may duplicate checkout and validation work.

recommendations.action: Keep deployment-conformance.yml and production-baseline.yml separate until their required checks and failure semantics are compared.
recommendations.reason: They are production gates; premature consolidation could reduce deployment protection.

recommendations.action: Add path filters to route, observability, hygiene and integrity workflows so unrelated bulk data uploads do not trigger them.
recommendations.reason: Path scoping reduces duplicate emails and unnecessary Actions consumption while preserving checks.
